name: Gingered Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dark rum or apple juice
1/4 cup shredded coconut, toasted if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pineapple lengthwise into fourths; remove the core.
2. Cut along the curved edges to loosen the pineapple from the rind without cutting it.
3. Cut the fruit in the rind crosswise into 3/4-inch slices; then cut lengthwise down the center of the slices, leaving the cut fruit in the rind shell.
4. Mix the rum and gingerroot in a bowl.
5. Spoon the mixture over the pineapple pieces.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
7. Sprinkle with shredded coconut if desired.
8. Garnish with strawberries and mint leaves, if desired.
